query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A nighttime park scene with evergreen trees and leafless deciduous trees appearing as dark shapes against a bright orange sky. Several streetlamps cast light along a pathway and grassy area in the middle ground. In the foreground, steps with a metal railing lead toward the park. A thin decorative border frames the image.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime park scene suffused with a sickly orange cast that washes the sky and landscape in an unnatural amber hue, evoking atmospheric distress. Evergreen and bare deciduous trees are rendered as severely underexposed black silhouettes against the glowing sky, with shadow detail crushed throughout the foreground steps and railing. Streetlamps along the path emit warm light, yet the oppressive monochrome tint and extreme underexposure flatten the scene into an eerie, unsettling tableau. A thin decorative border frames the image.
